description: Goal: make type projection for activation identity a real structural operation instead of recursive-only list widening. Signal: type tests prove literals widen to their declared domains, list/tuple/resource/map shapes project predictably, closure/callable values project to callable surface/target classes when exact instance identity is unnecessary, and observed evidence remains available outside the key projection. Strategy: build the operation in Types using the existing interned/set-theoretic machinery and recursive mappers; reuse existing closure identity erasure and callable-clause representation where they are the right abstraction; make the partition operation total, deterministic, and small. Outro: the old list-only convergence_class behavior is deleted, not renamed; no quicksort, Enum, reduce, or operator-specific branches exist in the type projector.
title: Compiler2 types: replace shallow convergence_class with structural activation partition classes
